art_market.summary: Seoul's art market remains a vibrant hub in Asia, driven by new digital initiatives and major gallery exhibitions in late March 2026.
new_exhibitions: 20!2026 Art Seoul (Digital exhibit, launched March 16, aims to build market trust)
ongoing: Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum of Art (ongoing)
Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (ongoing)

stock_market.summary: As of March 23, 2026, KOSPI closed at 5781.20. Goldman Sachs raised target. Markets show cautious optimism after recent volatility.

key_indicators.KOSPI_Status: Recent fluctuations; short-term correction anticipated in March with potential recovery in April.
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: AI-driven memory super-cycle, semiconductor industry strength, KRX KOSDAQ two-tier system plans for late 2026.
key_indicators.Outlook: Valuation adjustment in March followed by earnings momentum in April.
